lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਸਭ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har bhaj sabh kilabikh kaatt |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate, vibrate on the Lord, and all sins will be eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੀਸੁ ਕੀਜੈ ਗੁਰ ਵਾਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har ur dhaario gur poorai meraa sees keejai gur vaatt |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru has enshried the Lord, Har, Har, within my heart; I place my head on the Guru's Path. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਮੇਲਿਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਬਿਕਾਨੋ ਹਟਿ ਹਾਟ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har saajan melio gur poorai gur bachan bikaano hatt haatt |1|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has united me with the Lord, my Friend; I have sold myself at each and every store for the Guru's Word. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਮੈ ਬਾਤ ਸੁਨਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੇਵਉ ਕਟਿ ਕਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: mere har prabh kee mai baat sunaavai tis man devau katt kaatt |
lines.english: Whoever tells me the stories of my Lord God, I would cut my mind into slices, and dedicate it to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕੋ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਬਹੁ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਕਟਿ ਕਾਟ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin har naam ko mukat na paavai bahu kanchan deejai katt kaatt |2|
lines.english: but without the Lord's Name, no one attains liberation, even though one may give away huge amounts of gold. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਕਰ ਪ੍ਰਾਗਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਆ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਦੀਓ ਅਧ ਕਾਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: makar praag daan bahu keea sareer deeo adh kaatt |
lines.english: One may give donations in charity at Prayaag, and cut the body in two at Benares,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਓ ਮਨਿ ਉਘਰੇ ਕਪਟ ਕਪਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: har keerat guramat jas gaaeo man ughare kapatt kapaatt |
lines.english: When one follows the Guru's Teachings, and sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, the doors of the mind, held shut by deception, are thrown open again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਜੁਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਨ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖੇ ਲਿਲਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: kalajug gur pooraa tin paaeaa jin dhur masatak likhe lilaatt |
lines.english: They alone find the Perfect Guru in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, upon whose foreheads such pre-ordained destiny is inscribed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਕੁਟੀ ਫੋਰਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ਲਜ ਭਾਨੀ ਮਟੁਕੀ ਮਾਟ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: trikuttee for bharam bhau bhaagaa laj bhaanee mattukee maatt |3|
lines.english: The three qualities are shattered, doubt and fear run away, and the clay pot of public opinion is broken. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆ ਸਭ ਲਾਥੀ ਭੂਖ ਤਿਖਾਟ ॥੪॥੬॥ ਛਕਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ras amrit peea sabh laathee bhookh tikhaatt |4|6| chhakaa 1 |
lines.english: Servant Nanak drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar; all his hunger and thirst are quenched. ||4||6|| Set of Six Hymns 1||
Maalee Gauraa, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਟਹਲਾ ਝੂਠੀਆ ਨਿਤ ਕਰੈ ਜਮੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avar ttahalaa jhoottheea nit karai jam sir maar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Other services are false, and as punishment for them, the Messenger of Death bashes in one's head. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਟਹਲ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: re man ttehal har sukh saar |
lines.english: O mind, true peace comes from serving the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੀਖਿਆ ਤੇ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੰਗਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa masatak leekhiaa te mile sangaar |
lines.english: They alone join the Sangat, the Congregation, upon whose forehead such destiny is inscribed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਾਰਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sansaar bhaujal taariaa har sant purakh apaar |1|
lines.english: They are carried across the terrifying world-ocean by the Saints of the Infinite, Primal Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਚਰਨ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਸਾਧ ਕੇ ਤਜਿ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: nit charan sevahu saadh ke taj lobh moh bikaar |
lines.english: Serve forever at the feet of the Holy; renounce greed, emotional attachment and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤਜਹੁ ਦੂਜੀ ਆਸੜੀ ਰਖੁ ਆਸ ਇਕ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh tajahu doojee aasarree rakh aas ik nirankaar |2|
lines.english: Abandon all other hopes, and rest your hopes in the One Formless Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਹੋਵਨਾ ਸੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਕੋ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhur hovanaa su hoeaa ko na mettanahaar |3|
lines.english: Whatever is pre-ordained, comes to pass; no one can erase it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੂਲੇ ਸਾਕਤਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਅੰਧ ਅੰਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik bharam bhoole saakataa bin gur andh andhaar |
lines.english: Some are faithless cynics, deluded by doubt; without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan te jan naanakaa jin har naamaa ur dhaar |4|1|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed are those humble beings, O Nanak, who enshrine the Lord's Name in their hearts. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਰੂਪੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕਾ ਅਨਿਕ ਨਾਮ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: agam roop gobind kaa anik naam apaar |
lines.english: The beauty of the Lord of the Universe is profound and unfathomable; the Names of the Infinite Lord are immunerable.
Chanting it, one is saved. ||1||Pause||
I humbly bow to the Name of the Lord.
Maalee Gauraa, Fifth Mehl:
Meditating on Him in remembrance, conflicts are ended.
Meditating on Him, the fool becomes wise.
Meditating on Him, one's bonds are untied.
Meditating on Him, one's ancestors are saved. ||1||
Meditating on Him, sins are erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਭਉ ਦੁਖ ਹਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran bhau dukh harai |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, fear and pain are taken away.
Meditating on Him, misfortune is avoided.
Meditating on Him, Maya becomes one's slave.
Meditating on Him, the heart blossoms forth.
Meditating on Him, agony is ended. ||2||
Meditating on Him, one crosses over in the end. ||3||
Meditating on Him, one is blessed with the treasures of wealth.
It saves millions of devotees.
The Name of the Lord is the Purifier of sinners.
Nanak lays his forehead on the feet of the Saints. ||4||2||
I am meek; I seek the Sanctuary of the slaves of the Lord's slaves.
Maalee Gauraa, Fifth Mehl:
It is like a boat to a drowning man.
Meditating in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one's affairs are perfectly resolved. ||1||Pause||
This is the sort of helper the Name of the Lord is.
